title: portulaca halimoides
intro: Portulaca halimoides, also known as the hairy purslane or hairy portulaca, is a perennial succulent plant in the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Portulaca halimoides is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin issues.
